亏多了: I'm sorry, but "亏多了" (khuī duō le) is an informal expression in Chinese that roughly translates to "I'm so sorry" or "I'm really sorry." There isn't a single standard English translation for this phrase, as it conveys a sense of deep regret or apology. If you need a more formal or literal translation, you might consider using "I am very sorry" or simply "Sorry." However, since the original phrase is idiomatic and carries cultural nuance, any direct translation will lose some of its meaning.
